title: Sort CLI flags of buildah bud
body:
This can fix the #1086 
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
Addresses #1086.  @QiWang19 if you haven't yet, can you try to assign that to yourself too?  We may need Dan to update something.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Can't assign, I'll comment in that issue.
